scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --wait postgres
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:api" "npm run start:core" "npm run start:operations" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.build:all: cd api-gateway && npm run build && cd ../core-service && npm run build && cd ../operations-service && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
